name: 愚昧冷酷丈夫／後悔型男主
name_en: Oblivious Cruel Husband / Regretful Male Lead
description: Richard的角色弧線是從冷酷無情到追悔莫及。他從未了解妻子的真實身份，盲目信任外人，最終在真相大白後跪地求復合。這種角色滿足了觀眾「你不珍惜就會失去」的心理期待。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: We were married for 3 years. You never thought to mention that you're one of the world's most talented new directors. You never even said you like movies. ... Michelle, please. I know I screwed up. Give me another chance.
examples.context: Richard的角色弧線是從冷酷無情到追悔莫及。他從未了解妻子的真實身份，盲目信任外人，最終在真相大白後跪地求復合。這種角色滿足了觀眾「你不珍惜就會失去」的心理期待。
